def negative_frozenset_not_used_for_constant_membership_set_rebuilt_per_call():
    rule_id = "frozenset_not_used_for_constant_membership_set_rebuilt_per_call"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Constant set literal rebuilt on every function call; hoist as frozenset at module scope."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
